originalTitle: The Dow Jones Industrial Average Will Change Forever on June 29, With Verizon Getting the Boot and a Virtual Monopoly Joining the Index
summary: Verizon's 22-year run in the iconic Dow is ending, with a trillion-dollar company that's an artificial intelligence (AI) applications leader taking its place.
content: Verizon's 22-year run in the iconic Dow is ending, with a trillion-dollar company that's an artificial intelligence (AI) applications leader taking its place.
chineseTitle: 道琼斯工业平均指数将于 6 月 29 日发生永远变化，Verizon 被剔除，一家虚拟垄断企业将加入该指数
chineseSummary: Verizon 在标志性道琼斯指数中长达 22 年的统治即将结束，取而代之的是一家市值数万亿美元的人工智能 (AI) 应用领导者公司。
chineseContent: Verizon 在标志性道琼斯指数中长达 22 年的统治即将结束，取而代之的是一家市值数万亿美元的人工智能 (AI) 应用领导者公司。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
